Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Karosha]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — The throne of Karosha is an entity the narrator is willing to cooperate with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Karosha is a planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — Karosha is a place ruled by a Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — Zorova left Karosha a year ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 48''' — Shyrax the Third is the Queen of Karosha.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 18''' — Karosha is a place with a Throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Karosha is a location that Shyrax's fleet needs to retake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — The former Queen of Karosha is a suspect in Doctor Nova's kidnapping.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Karosha is a location the Alliance requires visitors to go to in person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Karosha is a place from which Shyrax was exiled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — Karosha has royal laboratories belonging to the King Regent.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Karosha is a place that requires reclamation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — Interactions with the Visirian planetary government are reported to Karosha within an hour.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — Shyrax's people have been away from Karosha for almost two years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — The Perfected left Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 34''' — Karosha is a major system that the Swarm-Queen might feed on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — Karosha is the realm of Queen Shyrax.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Karosha is a location ruled by King Regent Felrex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — Alchemy is well-respected on Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Karosha is the home of a Rebel Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Shyrax has a royal palace on Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — Prince Veshran is of Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 21''' — Karosha has a royal house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Felrex is the King-Regent of Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Karosha is a group or entity that the Union business might affect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — King-Regent Felrex has a royal palace on Karosha.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
